title: Rwanda – Country Overview
content: Rwanda is a landlocked country in East Africa known as the Land of a Thousand Hills. It has experienced remarkable economic recovery and is recognized for strong governance, biodiversity, and social cohesion.

title: Kingdom of Rwanda
content: The Kingdom of Rwanda was a pre-colonial state established around the 15th century. It was ruled by a Mwami and had a centralized political system with deep cultural traditions.

title: Rwandan Cultural Heritage
content: Rwanda’s cultural heritage includes Intore dance, traditional music, crafts, storytelling, and values rooted in unity and community.

title: Family Lineage in Rwanda
content: Family lineage has historically defined identity, inheritance, and social structure within Rwandan communities through clans and oral genealogy.
